name: Crazy Taxi VR - Car Taxi Simulator

reviews.review_description: This game is TRASH CANT EVEN GET INSIDE CAR GRAFICS HORRIBLE WORST GAME EVER DO NOT PLAY

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your frustration, and we sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered. Our game is in Early Access, and we’re working tirelessly to address bugs, polish graphics, and improve gameplay.

The “unable to enter the car” bug has been fixed in the latest update we encourage you to revisit the game to see the improvements.

Visual upgrades are rolling out progressively, and your feedback helps us prioritize these changes.

We completely understand your disappointment, but if you’re willing, we’d greatly appreciate you trying the updated version. If the changes improve your experience, we’d be grateful if you could reconsider your review to reflect the progress. Early Access thrives on community input, and we’re committed to earning your trust.

Thank you for your patience and for giving us a chance to grow. 🛠️🚗

reviews.review_description: Great game, I love although the graphics are very blocky other than that the sound effects are good and the realism is not quite there but it's still fun 😊

developer_response.body:
Hola! 😊 Thank you SO much for your kind words and feedback! We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the fun side of our game! Just a quick note—the game is currently in Early Access, which means we’re still polishing things like graphics, realism, and other details (we agree, blocky textures are on our hit list! 🔨). Your shoutout about the sound effects made our day—we’ll keep fine-tuning the rest!

If you have specific suggestions for improvements, feel free to share at bankasolutions@gmail.com we’re all ears! Thanks for joining us on this journey and helping shape the game’s future. Stay awesome! 🚀

reviews.review_description:
Game is pretty cool, with good sound effects that really pull you in. The hilarious hit effect when pedestrians, and signals get in the way. There's a variety of cars and different ride options add even more fun. Definitely one to try if you like simulators or crazy taxi. 
Game have more potential, add rider profile and ride history feature would be additions to track your craziest trips. Overall it is good game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We are glad to hear you’re enjoying the game and that the sound effects and hit effects are adding to the fun. We appreciate your suggestion for a rider profile and ride history feature. It sounds like a great way to enhance the gameplay experience and track those wild trips! We will definitely consider this for future updates. If you have any more ideas or feedback, feel free to share!

Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry to hear that your experience didn't meet your expectations. The game is currently in early access, which means we're continuously working on improvements and new content. Your input is invaluable in helping us refine and enhance the game. If you're open to sharing more details about what you found unsatisfactory, we’d love to hear from you so we can make the necessary improvements. Contact at bankasolutions@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: Don't let the picture fool you. There's not a lot of pedestrians walking around. The only pedestrian I have seen was one pedestrian that I had to pick up. That's it. When you're driving, there's nothing that happens to your vehicle when you go head on against somebody, so when you hit somebody head on, their car flies over your car. I like the fact that it has some okay sceneries to drive around. I just wish there were some pedestrians walking on the sidewalk and stuff like that, but you see none of that. It's at a good price. The hands look a little weird they don't grip the wheel like it should . You don't grip the shift, and when you touch the person, your hand goes right through them . This game has potential. I can't wait to see what the next update will be. Hopefully, they will add pedestrians walking down the street or something. The game is still fun, though.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback! We’re glad you enjoyed the sceneries and found the game fun. Based on suggestions like yours, we’ve made several updates, including more pedestrians walking around, enhanced vehicle collision reactions, and improved hand interactions. Now your hands grip the wheel and shifter more realistically, and other vehicles feel more dynamic.

We’d love for you to give it another try and hope you'll find the updates make the experience even more enjoyable! Since our game is still in early access, we’re actively seeking more suggestions, so feel free to share any additional thoughts. If you're happy with the improvements, we’d really appreciate it if you could consider updating your review to reflect the new changes. Thanks again for your support!
